name: Unglued

draft.notes: 10-card pack: 6 commons, 2 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 basic land. The 6 token cards are treated as uncommons for collation (so a token can appear in the uncommon slots). One variation of each standard basic land.

sourceNotes: Silver-border 'Un-' set. Small set (smaller than a normal small set). 6 token cards collated as uncommons. Printed in USA. No foils (pre-1999). 48 packs per box.
